response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for both 'Weight of the World' and 'ROCK IN!'. Used on-screen text to correct minor discrepancies in the Japanese lyrics of 'Weight of the World' (e.g., '歌しを' instead of '愛しを'). Timing is strictly synchronized to the vocal audio waveform, including dialogue and the transitional MC segment. Subtitles are split at natural audio pauses to maintain semantic continuity.
